creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
That backtrace is kind-of useless. Can you rebuild mc WITH_DEBUG. We may need to set DEBUG_CFLAGS="-O0 -g" later as well. But let's try WITH_DEBUG first, hopefully the compiler won't optimize out too many variables.

Can you run more than one copy of mc in two different xterm or other windows? Can you run it in more than two tmux windows?
